scripts.generate:daily: npm run build && node dist/index.js daily-relaxation-rhythm generate
scripts.upload:daily: npm run build && node dist/index.js daily-relaxation-rhythm upload
scripts.generate:deep: npm run build && node dist/index.js deep-relax-flow generate
scripts.upload:deep: npm run build && node dist/index.js deep-relax-flow upload
scripts.generate:canvas: npm run build && node dist/index.js the-revived-canvas generate
scripts.upload:canvas: npm run build && node dist/index.js the-revived-canvas upload
